name: MAVINN Muay Thai Pattaya
addressFull: Thepprasit Road, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150

trainers.fightRecord: An independent June 2026 visitor profile reports more than 300 fights and a 95% win rate.
trainers.credentials: Namsaknoi is a multiple Lumpinee champion and former fighter of the year; co-head trainer Kaolan is a former Lumpinee champion.
trainers.ratio: A June 2026 first-hand visitor reported a good student-to-trainer ratio in low season; no fixed ratio is promised.

foreignerFriendly.sparring: Not published as a guaranteed beginner activity; professional-fighter clinch and sparring are visible.

training.schedule: Classes available Monday-Saturday within 07:00-20:00; pass holders may join any class

accommodation.notes: An on-site hotel is current; room prices were not found.

fighters.fightPath: The wider Mavinn team has active Rajadamnern and ONE competitors; exact Pattaya-resident roster changes should be confirmed.

praise: Recent reviewers describe a large, clean and newly equipped camp with close technical attention from champion trainers.
Visitors value the pool, sauna, ice bath and on-site accommodation for longer stays.
complaints: The premium tariff is materially above many neighbourhood camps; a current independent visitor explicitly notes the price difference.

confidenceReason: Current operator and independent first-hand evidence establish the head trainer, fight record, active fighters, foreign/beginner/women access, full pricing and operating status.
unverified: fixed trainer-to-student ratio in peak season
which named Mavinn fighters reside full-time at the Pattaya branch
